Broken Duck Studio

About Membership Resources Login

Membership Packages

Broken Duck Studio offers two membership plans: one for creators with monetized channels, and one for those still growing. All members get full access to our production spaces, workshops, community events, and booking system. Pricing is available monthly, every 6 months, or yearly.

Non-Monetized Membership

For YouTubers actively working toward monetization.

Monthly 6 Months Yearly
2,500 THB 13,500 THB 16,000 THB
  • 24/7 access to all production spaces
  • Booking system for studios, booths, and meeting rooms
  • Workshops every Sunday morning
  • Monthly networking events
  • Locker storage and fast internet
  • 4 guest passes per month
  • Matched with a mentor from a monetized member
  • Access to the private online community

This membership is for creators who are building their channels and want a consistent, supportive environment. You'll have access to all studio spaces, workshops, events, and mentorship from monetized members.

Join Now

Monetized Membership

For YouTubers with an active monetized channel.

Monthly 6 Months Yearly
1,500 THB 8,000 THB 12,000 THB
  • 24/7 access to all production spaces
  • Booking system for studios, booths, and meeting rooms
  • Workshops every Sunday morning
  • Monthly networking events
  • Locker storage and fast internet
  • 4 guest passes per month
  • Serve as a mentor to non-monetized members
  • Access to the private online community
  • Eligibility for future partner/MCN programs

This membership is for creators who have reached monetization and want reliable studio access and opportunities to support other members. All studio access is included, and you'll have the option to mentor new creators and participate in upcoming partner services.

Join Now

What’s Included With Membership

Broken Duck Studio is more than just a workspace. It’s a structured system designed to help YouTube creators make consistent, high-quality content — with the facilities, tools, and community to back it up.

Every member gets 24/7 access to the studio, including use of voiceover booths, recording studios, office desks, and a private meeting room. Access is managed through a secure entry system and an online booking platform.

12 hours per month in video studios
12 hours per month in voiceover booths
4 hours per month in the private meeting room
Weekly Sunday workshops for creators
Monthly public networking event (last Sunday of each month)
High-speed internet, filtered water, personal locker
4 guest passes per month (+300 THB for extras)

All bookings follow a fair-use model with peak and off-peak weighting. Peak hours are Monday through Saturday from 10:00 to 18:00. Members can book up to 14 days in advance, with new times released each morning at 07:00.
